purpose: Self-contained, offline stealth-detector fixtures for the anti-detection benchmark suite. Deterministic and CI-gating; no external/CDN fetches at test time.

fixtures.note: First-party reimplementation of the public boolean signal set (webdriver, plugins, languages, chrome runtime, permissions, webgl vendor/renderer). NOT a verbatim copy of the third-party site.

refreshProcedure: When the public detector signal sets change, update the probe checks in the fixture HTML and re-record baseline.json against the current browser tool. Bump schemaVersion on a breaking probe-shape change. Keep fixtures self-contained (inline JS only, zero network).
license: Fixtures are first-party (repository license). Signal semantics are inspired by public detectors used under fair-use for interoperability testing.
